title: Supervise child Pi implementer processes with rich event capture
description: Implement child Pi process or SDK-session supervision for one tick per worktree. Borrow Pi subagent extension patterns: spawn pi --mode json --no-session with cwd set to the worktree, stream JSON events into an in-memory run model, aggregate usage/cost/context, write full JSONL/RPC logs and compact final reports, and support cancellation. This tick stops before merge/close policy.
acceptance_criteria: A disposable /ticks-run-tick or internal test can spawn a child Pi in a temp/worktree cwd, capture message/tool events, aggregate usage, and persist log + report artifacts. Cancellation terminates child processes. Tests cover event parsing and report extraction.
